figures.caption: Figure 1: Convergence diagnostics for estimators of the ATE functional. Panels display bias, coverage, mean squared error (MSE) and n×MSE/Efficiency Bound. Results are shown separately for the RieszCML and tmle3 frameworks, and for three nuisance configurations: all correctly specified, outcome regression misspecified, and propensity score misspecified.

Figure 2: TML estimates of the counterfactual mean of HIV-1 infection in vaccine recipients under additive shifts in CD4+ (top) and CD8+ (bottom) standardized polyfunctionality scores, including pointwise Wald-style confidence intervals. These estimates compare favorably with the analogous estimates of Figure 2 in Hejazi et al. (2020b).
